title: indulgent slovakian bean sprouts bread
description: a dense, slightly sour bread filled with bean sprouts and topped with a crumbly onion mixture, perfect for a pescatarian-friendly snack or side dish
instructions: in a small bowl, combine yeast and warm water, stirring to dissolve yeast; let sit for 5 minutes
in a large mixing bowl, combine flour, sour cream, and caraway seed; mix until a shaggy dough forms
add yeast mixture, bean sprouts, onion, salt, and pepper to dough; mix until well combined
knead dough for 10 minutes, until smooth and elastic
place dough in a greased bowl, cover with plastic wrap, and let rise in a warm place for 1 hour
punch down dough and shape into a round loaf; place on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper
dot top of loaf with melted butter
bake loaf for 35 minutes, or until golden brown
let loaf cool on a wire rack for 10 minutes before slicing
